title: Combo+
description:
It is a mod that is similar to a rhythm-based game but this time i decided to added it in Minecraft.
the mod basically checks how long you can hold a combo and how good your reach is when fighting your opponent.
body:
# Combo+ ⚔️🔥

![combopluspic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7557ad4b5bb8524b9a3b955347f27cde67c04464.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZrOb0LzfdJs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A fast-paced combo tracker for PvP that rewards precision, timing, and consistency with satisfying visuals, sounds, and milestones.

## Combo System 🧠

Track your hit streaks in real time and push your limits during combat.

How It Works
Your combo increases with every successful hit
Taking damage or waiting too long resets your combo
Combos start displaying at 3 hits
Built-in delay protection prevents false double-counts
## Judgment System 🎯

Every hit is evaluated based on timing, distance, and accuracy.

Hit Ratings
PERFECT / SMASH / HEADSHOT – high-skill hits
GOOD – solid timing
BAD / HORRID – weak or poorly timed hits
Features
Floating 3D judgments rendered in the world
Works for both melee and ranged combat
Headshots and smash attacks have unique feedback
Optional: disable judgments for a cleaner experience
## Combo HUD 🖥️

A dynamic on-screen combo display designed for PvP clarity.

Features
Animated combo counter with scaling + fade effects
Appears only when actively chaining hits
Automatically disappears after inactivity
Supports:
Custom number textures
Minecraft font mode
Minimal “Simple Mode” UI
## Simple Mode ✨

A clean, modern combo display for minimal setups.

Text-based combo counter
Smooth pulsing animation at higher combos
Dynamic color shifting
Displays milestone titles alongside combo
## Milestone System 🏆

Reach higher combos to unlock visual and audio rewards.

Features
Milestones every 5 hits
Special milestone tiers (10, 25, 50, 100, etc.)
Custom:
Sounds
Text
Textures
“Perfect streak” system:
Miss a perfect hit → lose milestone visuals
## Sound Feedback 🔊

Audio feedback that evolves with your combo.

Unique sounds for each hit in a chain
Special sounds for milestone combos
Increasing pitch as combo grows
Fully toggleable
## Customization ⚙️

Control everything directly in-game.

Commands
/comboplus on|off – Enable/disable mod
/comboplus ui on|off – Toggle HUD
/comboplus sound on|off – Toggle sounds
/comboplus number on|off – Toggle number UI
/comboplus perfect on|off – Toggle judgments
/comboplus simple on|off – Toggle simple mode
/comboplus font minecraft|normal – Switch font
/comboplus gui – Open settings screen
## Keybinds ⌨️

Quick toggles for everything:

Toggle Mod
Toggle UI
Toggle Sounds
Toggle Number UI
Toggle Perfect Judgments
Toggle Simple Mode
Open Config GUI

(All keybinds are customizable in controls)

## Config GUI 🧩
A built-in settings screen for quick adjustments.
Toggle all major features
Instant feedback on changes
Accessible via command or keybind


### Why Use Combo+? 💡
⚔️ Improve combat timing and consistency
🎯 Get instant feedback on your hits
🔥 Make PvP feel more rewarding
🎨 Customize your experience to match your style

Milestones
Credits
Caioxbz
